violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. > When asked what sanitizer was being used, employee could not determine what sanitizer is used. When asked about sanitize process, employee stated that only a dish detergent and hot water is used to clean dishes. A sanitize step must be done during the ware washing process.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. > Employee could not find or locate sanitizer test strips when asked.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
